items.caption_text:
Had a lovely day out with Atharv, my little sweetheart. We shared a great family experience. The natural beauty of Odhani Dam and the breathtaking sunset made our day perfect. 🧿😊😍😊 
#therawtextures #bigindianwanderers #babydayout #familytime #odhanidam

items.caption_text:
Bidding adieu with my last #platinggoals from Khirki Extension's nostalgic lanes. This place has etched lifelong memories and became my home away from home. Each nook felt familiar as I wandered. Grateful for your love. Next destination, coming soon. Thanks, Instafam, for your unwavering support during my hiatus. This shift has been a challenge, but I'll be back soon. 😍🤗 #therawtextures #khirkiextension #delhidiaries #chickenrice 

[ chicken curry, chicken rice, dinner, plating, homecooked, Bihari food, memories ]

items.caption_text:
New rooftop find in South Delhi ✨

Loved our visit to Nebo — a stylish spot with great vibes, chic interiors and the perfect setting for a fun evening out. 😍😎

Food highlights: Trio Chicken Tikka, Chicken Gyoza, Classic Chicken 65 and a warm Chocolate Brownie with Vanilla Ice Cream to end on a sweet note. 😍😋 

And the cocktails? So good. The Lace Up, Sticky Toffee Pudding Martini, H&J Legacy and Picante by Nebo were all absolute hits. 🍸

Great food, great drinks and an even better vibe — definitely a place to check out in Ansal Plaza. 😍 
.
#therawtextures #platinggoals #nebo #delhidiaries #rooftopparty 

[ rooftop party, plating, nebo, Ansal Plaza, Delhi, restaurant, cocktails ]

items.caption_text:
Ending the meal on a sweet note with the Make a Wish Blueberry flavoured dessert at The Sunday House. 🫐🍰
Creamy, fruity, and perfectly balanced with that tangy blueberry goodness — one bite and you’ll actually want to make a wish for another slice. ✨ 😍😋😊
📍 @sundayhouseindia Delhi
#therawtextures #platinggoals #blueberry #dessertlovers #celebration 

[ celebration, cake, dessert, plating, blueberry ]

items.caption_text:
This birthday was about self-love and those who truly care. 🎂🤗
Choosing to let go — of ego, noise, and negativity. 🧘‍♂️
Maa, your absence is a void that can never be filled. With your blessings, I just seek calmness and peace. 🙏
If you love me, I’m always there. If ego comes in between, I will quietly let go. ✨
.
#therawtextures #bigindianwanderers #letitgo #happybirthday #odhnidam 

[ odhni dam, happy birthday, birthday post, calmness, peace ]
